description: OpenSubsonic-to-Jellyfin compatibility layer. Use Subsonic/Navidrome clients (DSub, Substreamer, etc.) with your Jellyfin music library.
name: Subfin
overview: Exposes an OpenSubsonic-compatible REST API at /rest/* so that Subsonic clients can browse and stream your Jellyfin music library.
